cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import sys, json
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert(0, 'runtime')
from agent_identity_loader import load_all_agents
from shared_event_runtime import create_workspace, add_workspace_entry, close_workspace, _load_stream_index
from memory_runtime import read_memory
from journal_runtime import read_journal

repo_root = Path('.')
identities = load_all_agents(repo_root=repo_root)
mega = identities['megabyte']

# K4 diagnosis: close workspace and inspect what closing_event_id produces
ws = create_workspace(mega, 'K4-diag', repo_root=repo_root)
add_workspace_entry(ws['workspace_id'], mega, 'Test.', repo_root)
wsc = close_workspace(ws['workspace_id'], mega, 'resolved', repo_root, identities)
print('K4 closing_event_id:', wsc.get('closing_event_id'))
print('K4 status:', wsc.get('status'))

# M1 diagnosis: check what read_memory returns
smems = read_memory(identities['sakura'], 'personal')
print('M1 read_memory return type:', type(smems).__name__)
print('M1 keys:', list(smems.keys()) if isinstance(smems, dict) else smems)

# M2 diagnosis
rjrnls = read_journal(identities['remy'])
print('M2 read_journal return type:', type(rjrnls).__name__)
print('M2 keys:', list(rjrnls.keys()) if isinstance(rjrnls, dict) else rjrnls)
"
